{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20969_1
|class_id=20969
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=collection@20969_2
|fame=29
|art=16
|fth=12
|civ=19
|tech=14
|ss1=In explorations, 2x Green Card Drops +0.2%<br>In explorations, 2x Blue Card Drops +0.2%
|ss2=In explorations, 2x Green Card Drops +0.4%<br>In explorations, 2x Blue Card Drops +0.4%
|ss3=In explorations, 2x Green Card Drops +0.6%<br>In explorations, 2x Blue Card Drops +0.6%
|ss4=In explorations, 2x Green Card Drops +0.6%<br>In explorations, 2x Blue Card Drops +0.6%
|ss7=In explorations, 2x Green Card Drops +0.6%<br>In explorations, 2x Blue Card Drops +0.6%<br> (Awakened)
}}
